metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4972
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2: SRGAP2C dimerizes with SRGAP2A and inhibits its membrane deformation properties in COS7 cells.

Figure 6: SRGAP2C (human protein) expression in cultured mouse cortical neurons phenocopies SRGAP2 deficiency in dendritic spines. SRGAP2C expression resulted in decreased dendritic spine head width (Fig. 6B) and increased spine neck length (Fig. 6C). In juvenile mice, the same phenotype and increased spine density was observed.. Experimental description: From results;

Figure 6 legend: "Effect of SRGAP2C expression in juvenile mice in layer 2/3 pyramidal neurons following in utero electroporation (IUE) at E15.5."

"We isolated one cDNA clone from a human library (GenBank: BC112927.1) that originates from SRGAP2C which is almost identical in sequence to the first 9 exons of the ancestral SRGAP2A, except for five non-synonymous base-pair mutations (out of 1356 base pairs) mutating 5 arginine (5R) residues (Figure 1A)"

This GenBank entry matches human entrez gene ID 653464 (SRGAP2C / SLIT-ROBO Rho GTPase activating protein 2C)
